title: stelis juninensis
intro: Stelis juninensis, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis juninensis include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Stelis juninensis is often used in infusions or teas, and it can also be dried and used in capsules or tinctures for its medicinal benefits.
